subject: docs: update stale meta-color advice and data-neutral history note
body:
AI_MISTAKES.md: replaced "use a mid-tone brand color" advice (pre-DaisyUI
era) with current approach — meta colors computed from DaisyUI theme oklch
values per-combo in themes.ts.

HISTORY.md: clarified --color-data-neutral rename entry — noted it was
later removed entirely when the @theme block was deleted.

Tags: docs, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
